title: The Big Picture Guineas Q3 Bauxite Supply
section_path: The Big Picture Guineas Q3 Bauxite Supply
section_path_text: The Big Picture Guineas Q3 Bauxite Supply
summary:
Main
· Guinea's bauxite trade to China has been the leading Capesize fronthaul trade growth story of 2025, although mining licence revocations in Guinea and the arrival of the rainy season cast doubt on Q3 performance. · Guinea's bauxite exports leapt to 99.8m tonnes in the 1H 2025, up a massive 26.4m tonnes year-on-year, official data showed, but experienced a seasonal drop in tracked shipments in July. · In the light of these new development we look at how Guinea's bauxite sector is evolving.
